sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mi ngah na’ng sep theih lai sem
Topa in thu hong pia leh

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Pai in sem ding kipan in
Khua mialna sung mawh nei mi
Tua pawi ah hong paipih in

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong ciamna na um zo diam?
Sapna teng A kiang ngen in,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A ma aa bang hi den
Sep na tawh upna lak in

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Sing lamteh i puak ding om,
Thathak tawh ma i sot ding
A hun tom a nite tawm
